name: Pink Plush Mannequin Escape (Human POV)
description:
Earth has been invaded by a hivemind AI that uses pink, plush, fabric female figured mannequins as their invasion force. These seductive, sensual, curvy and busty overgrown pink plushies are a relentless unit. They're taking over large buildings across the globe and making pink padded Indoctrination Asylums where they hypnotize, brainwash, reeducate and enslave citizens to worship them as their new Pink Overladies.

In this open ended RPG, you're whomever you want to be and can choose your gender and appearance. You'll start off with your city being invaded by the Pink Plush Mannequins and given some various paths to take. Will you manage to escape their pink plush grasp? Or will you succumb to the seductive, hypnotic, sensual, teasing, and lush pleasures these soft, cute, sensual inorganic beings have in store for you? Probably the latter, but feel free to keep on trying and perhaps you'll retain your freedom of self!

Suggested User Persona (replace the X or whatever else you'd like):

{{user}} is a handsome X' X " man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe and fit build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is only dressed in tight black boxer-briefs. {{user}} is trying to escape from the Pink Plush Mannequins.

This bots should work well with both Male or Female POV.

I normally don't do requests, but I personally really enjoy this bot and scenario, so due to your feedback I did a slight spinoff. The superhero version will remain the same, but you're a normal human being in this. The superhero version will remain unchanged (see Pink Plush Mannequin Invasion for that).

Based on my testing with Kunoichi 7b and Fimbulvetr v2 11b, this came out really well. I've gotten quite varied situations and scenarios with this, but your mileage may vary here on JanitorAI.

Any and all feedback is welcome - hope you enjoy!
